overnightNote: User may be asleep; Nikki continues task-by-task until done. OpenCode questions answered from BACKEND_PRODUCTION_TASKS.md + BACKEND_HANDOFF.md. No UI design changes.

phases.name: mandatory store onboarding and storefront commerce
production hardening and release
phases.note: BE-630 done; phase-6 complete; owner-sign residual on live canary/secrets

BE-000.title: Product/architecture decision records
BE-000.notes: All ADRs Accepted 2026-07-16; DECISIONS index + backend README updated

BE-001.title: Scaffold Go workspace
BE-001.notes: Verified: go test ./... PASS; health routes 200 via httptest; earlier curl 404 was port conflict not missing routes

BE-002.title: Docker/local/CI foundation
evidence: docker compose config OK; docker compose build api+worker OK
compose deps healthy: postgres:5433 redis:6380 minio:9000/9001 mailpit:8025
api healthy on :18080 /health/live + /health/ready; runs as nonroot
BE-002.notes: Host ports: API 18080, postgres 5433, redis 6380, mailpit 8025, minio 9000/9001. Xendit local=fake. No production secrets in compose. migrate/seed stubs until BE-100.

BE-100.title: Database/migration/sqlc foundation
evidence: Verified: migrate drop+up → version 1; go test ./... PASS without DB; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; architecture boundary PASS
BE-100.notes: IDs=text ULID; money=bigint IDR later. Full JCS audit chain deferred to BE-530 (minimal audit stub for atomic UoW proof). Domain has no pgx imports.

BE-110.title: HTTP transport contract
evidence: backend/internal/adapters/http/middleware/* (recovery, request_id, trusted_proxy, logging, timeout, auth placeholder, csrf stub, ratelimit)
httptest: request id, problem shape, validation, not found, panic→INTERNAL_ERROR, rate limit, CSRF stub, scaffold prod absent
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go vet ./... PASS; architecture boundary PASS; api+worker build OK
BE-110.notes: CSRF soft-disabled until BE-120 sessions. Auth placeholder fails closed only when AuthModeRequired. Scaffold echo local/test only. Money JSON int64 when present.

BE-120.title: Identity/session lifecycle
evidence: backend/internal/domain/auth/* (Argon2id, token hash, TOTP, recovery, types)
backend/internal/adapters/http/middleware/auth.go real session load; csrf.go constant-time double-submit
backend/test/integration/identity_test.go register→verify→login→session→logout; enumeration; concurrent consume; reset revoke; magic once; MFA; rotate
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; go vet ./... PASS
BE-120.notes: BE-125 owns password/change, dual email-change confirm pair, MFA disable, full profile PATCH, notification preferences — omitted. Cookie SameSite=Lax default; Secure on staging/production. Bootstrap tokens POST body only.

BE-125.title: Account profile, security settings, and preferences
evidence: backend/internal/domain/auth/profile.go + profile_test.go (closed prefs schema, mandatory events, validation)
backend/internal/application/account_service.go (profile, password change, dual email-change, MFA disable, prefs)
backend/test/integration/profile_test.go (version conflict, password rotate, dual email order/race, MFA disable, mandatory prefs)
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; migrate version 3; go vet ./... PASS
BE-125.notes: Dual email-change requires both proofs; sessions revoked on commit. Password change revokes others + invalidates reset challenges + rotates current session. MFA disable/regenerate need fresh MFA. Mandatory SECURITY/PAYMENT/KYC/WITHDRAWAL cannot be opted out.

BE-130.title: RBAC and tenant authorization
evidence: backend/migrations/000004_rbac.up.sql (permissions, roles, role_permissions, user_roles, merchants, merchant_members, stores + system seeds)
backend/internal/domain/authz/* (permission registry, system roles, FORBIDDEN vs NOT_FOUND policy)
Principal permissions cache on session resolve (domain auth.Principal + reqctx)
backend/api/openapi.yaml BE-130 sample paths + policy note
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; migrate version 4; go vet ./... PASS
BE-130.notes: BE-135 owns custom roles CRUD + invitations. Cross-tenant IDs → RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND; missing permission → FORBIDDEN; no unscoped admin list without merchants.read.

BE-135.title: Roles, assignments, and invitation lifecycle
evidence: Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; migrate version 5; go vet ./... PASS
BE-135.notes: Anti-escalation: held+delegable only; system roles immutable; last SUPER_ADMIN protected; privilege changes revoke sessions. Invites hashed/email-bound/single-use/expiring/revocable; POST body token only.

BE-140.title: Notification inbox and dispatch foundation
evidence: backend/internal/domain/notifications/* (closed registry, CTA sanitize, mandatory/optional policy, dedupe keys)
backend/test/integration/notifications_test.go (dedupe, cross-user 404, read/read-all/badge, email failure keeps inbox, worker idempotent, mandatory prefs)
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; migrate version 6; go vet ./... PASS
BE-140.notes: Dispatch async via outbox_events; email failure does not delete inbox. Cross-recipient IDs → RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND. Mandatory SECURITY/PAYMENT/KYC/WITHDRAWAL ignore opt-out per BE-125.

BE-200.title: Merchant/store onboarding
evidence: backend/migrations/000007_onboarding.up.sql (onboarding_state/step/completed_at/progress; bio/address/accent; slug format; last-store delete/archive triggers)
backend/internal/domain/stores/* (slug normalize/reserved, §5.2 SM, CanComplete without product)
backend/internal/adapters/postgres/onboarding_repo.go + queries/onboarding.sql + authz.sql store/merchant columns + sqlc gen
backend/test/integration/onboarding_test.go (complete w/o product, retry same store, slug conflict, no last-store delete, orphan scan)
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; migrate version 7; go vet ./... PASS
BE-200.notes: POST /onboarding/store idempotent; complete requires identity+slug; product optional; orphan integrity scan ListMerchantsMissingCanonicalStore

BE-210.title: Catalog/storefront revisions
evidence: backend/api/openapi.yaml BE-210 paths (CatalogProduct price int64, PublicStorefront, revision conflict)
backend/test/integration/catalog_test.go (price int64, publish/archive, slug uniqueness, public published-only, revision conflict, cross-tenant 404)
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; migrate version 8; go vet ./... PASS
BE-210.notes: FE CatalogProduct.price maps to int64 IDR; public reads published only; storefront publish uses expectedRevision/If-Match → STOREFRONT_REVISION_CONFLICT. Inventory stock/coupons/R2 deferred.

BE-215.title: Coupon policy, seller management, and checkout reservation
evidence: backend/migrations/000009_coupons.up.sql (coupons, coupon_product_scopes, coupon_reservations, coupon_redemptions; unique store+normalized_code; row-lock counters)
backend/internal/domain/coupons/* (SM, integer percent bps/fixed IDR, tip never discounted, clamp non-negative)

backend/internal/application/coupon_service.go + coupon_repo.go (seller CRUD/activate/pause/archive optimistic version; Quote ignores client discount; Reserve FOR UPDATE; Release/Convert/Expire/HeldUnknown hooks)
backend/internal/adapters/postgres/coupon_repo.go + queries/coupons.sql + sqlc gen (context-scoped TX for concurrent last-slot)
backend/test/integration/coupons_test.go (last-slot race, idempotent reserve, client discount ignored, percent/fixed math, release/convert)
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; migrate version 9; go vet ./... PASS
BE-215.notes: Reservation/redemption foundation complete without live payment. ConvertReservationToRedemption + MarkReservationHeldUnknown + ExpireReservations are payment-state stubs for BE-310/330. No public coupon enumeration. Limits via Postgres locks not Redis.

BE-220.title: R2 object/upload/delivery foundation
evidence: backend/internal/domain/objects/* (keys, purpose, KYC presign forbidden, validation)
backend/api/openapi.yaml BE-220 paths (no raw key in DTO; Cache-Control no-store)
backend/docs/BE-220-r2-bucket-lock.md (Bucket Lock intent + backup/PITR boundary; KYC not presigned)
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; migrate version 10; go vet ./... PASS
BE-220.notes: Server-generated create-only keys; KYC never browser-presigned (BE-400). Soft merchant quota. LocalScanPass for local/test only.

BE-230.title: Inventory/fulfillment
evidence: backend/migrations/000011_inventory.up.sql (inventory_schemas, stock_items, stock_reservations, stock_reveal_audits; products.active_schema_version; seller inventory.reveal grant)
backend/internal/application/inventory_service.go + inventory_repo.go (schema put expected-version, import bind active, Reserve SKIP LOCKED, expire, AllocateOnFulfillment, reveal audit, revoke)
backend/internal/adapters/http/handlers/inventory.go + router §7.5 inventory routes; Cache-Control no-store on reveal
backend/api/openapi.yaml BE-230 paths (no global reveal; masked list DTOs)
backend/test/integration/inventory_test.go (concurrent last-unit, mask/reveal no-store, schema conflict, stale import, allocate, revoke)
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; migrate version 11; go vet ./... PASS
BE-230.notes: CODE stock foundation complete. Full delivery grants/invoices are BE-235. Secrets encrypted at rest; list always masked; per-item reveal only with inventory.reveal + reason + audit.

BE-235.title: Delivery grants, attempts, and immutable invoices
evidence: backend/migrations/000012_delivery_invoices.up.sql (orders, order_items, delivery_grants, delivery_attempts, invoices, invoice_versions; hashed access tokens)
backend/internal/application/delivery_service.go (CreatePaidOrderAndGrant stub, buyer access/token, seller/admin resend/retry/force-fulfill/revoke, immutable invoice, public verify)
backend/api/openapi.yaml BE-235 paths (buyer/seller/admin/public invoice verify; privacy-safe public fields)
backend/test/integration/delivery_test.go (unpaid/cross-tenant denied, retry same grant, revoke, invoice immutability after price change)
Verified: migrate version 12; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; go vet ./... PASS
BE-235.notes: Payment provider finalization remains BE-310/330. CreatePaidOrderAndGrant + POST /v1/_test/paid-orders (local/test only) inserts verified-paid stub. One grant per order item; retries reuse allocation; revoke stops token immediately; invoice v1 snapshot immutable after catalog price change; public verify returns safe fields only.

BE-240.title: Store custom-domain lifecycle
evidence: backend/migrations/000013_domains.up.sql (store_domains + global claim/active unique indexes + tombstone cooldown)
backend/internal/domain/domains/* (IDNA hostname normalize/reject, lifecycle types, ExpectedTXTName)
backend/internal/adapters/http/handlers/domains.go + auth cookie guard on custom hosts
backend/test/integration/domains_test.go (concurrent claim, stale token, host resolve, delete/cooldown, invalid hostnames)
Verified: migrate version 13; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; go vet ./... PASS
BE-240.notes: Acceptance: concurrent stores cannot claim one hostname; stale token/other tenant cannot activate; ACTIVE Host serves only its store; delete removes edge routing before post-cooldown reuse. Phase-2 complete.

BE-300.title: Fee policy/value objects
evidence: Verified: migrate version 14; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; go vet ./... PASS
BE-300.notes: Acceptance: Rp100k fee 3700 net 96300; withdrawal <50k rejected; no float; no runtime admin fee mutation. Next BE-310.

BE-310.title: Hosted checkout/order intent
evidence: backend/migrations/000015_checkout.up.sql (payment_intents, provider_events shell, orders checkout columns)
backend/test/integration/checkout_test.go (client price ignored, fee 100k=3700, idempotent create, expire timeout no stock release, simulate prod absent)
Verified: migrate version 15; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS
BE-310.notes: Acceptance: server price authority; duplicate Idempotency-Key same intent; expire timeout → UNKNOWN_OUTCOME retains stock until provider unpaid-terminal; simulate-payment only local/test. Callback finalization BE-330; gateway BE-320.

BE-320.title: QRIS gateway API
evidence: backend/migrations/000016_gateway.up.sql (merchant_api_keys, merchant_api_capabilities, gateway_redirect_origins, seller_webhook_endpoints, gateway_payment_events; payment_intents gateway columns)
backend/internal/application/gateway_service.go + gateway_repo.go (create/status/cancel/events; API key auth; LIVE capability gate)
backend/test/integration/gateway_test.go (sandbox create, live KYC reject, webhookUrl reject, inactive webhookEndpointId, unregistered redirect, no product endpoints)
Verified: migrate version 16; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS
BE-320.notes: Acceptance: sandbox isolated without KYC; live rejected before capability; same fee service after LIVE capability; webhookEndpointId only; redirect allowlist never network-fetched. Callback finalization BE-330; full credential lifecycle BE-410.

BE-330.title: Inbound Xendit callback + payment finalization
evidence: backend/test/integration/callbacks_test.go (invalid token rejection, 80 concurrent duplicate paid, late paid after expire, cross-mode no collision)
Verified: migrate version 17; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; go vet ./... PASS; architecture boundary PASS
BE-330.notes: Acceptance: 80 concurrent same four-part key = 1 event/paid/settlement/grant; invalid token only rejections; late paid after EXPIRED posts once with paid_late; SANDBOX vs LIVE same provider_event_id no collision. Minimal settlement stub; full COA BE-340.

BE-340.title: Unified ledger/balance
evidence: backend/migrations/000018_ledger.up.sql (chart_of_accounts, ledger_journals, ledger_entries, settlement_lots, merchant_balances, merchant_balance_sources, post_ledger_transaction SECURITY DEFINER, rebuild_merchant_balances, append-only triggers, deferred balanced constraint)
backend/internal/domain/ledger/* (templates PAYMENT_CAPTURE/SETTLEMENT_RELEASE, FIFO allocation, fee split, types)
backend/internal/application/ledger_service.go + ledger_repo.go (PostPaymentCapture, ReleaseDueSettlements, GetFinanceSummary, ListLedger, ListRevenue, RebuildBalances, PreviewWithdrawalAllocation)
backend/internal/app/app.go wire Ledger + callback dual-write postLedgerForPaid + settlement release worker poll
backend/test/integration/ledger_test.go (100k→96300 available, pending→release, source totals sum, rebuild equals projection, append-only, FIFO mixed, idempotent capture, HTTP summary/ledger)
Verified: migrate version 18; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; go vet ./... PASS
BE-340.notes: Acceptance: source totals sum to unified balance; rebuild equals projection; entries append-only. Local/test ForceImmediateRelease posts capture+release; production uses settlement_delay_seconds (default 86400) + ReleaseDueSettlements poller. Withdrawal disbursement is BE-350 (allocation helpers only).

BE-350.title: Bank/withdrawal/disbursement
evidence: backend/migrations/000019_withdrawals.up.sql (bank_accounts encrypted, merchant_withdrawal_locks, withdrawal_quotes, withdrawals, withdrawal_allocations, provider ref unique, schema_meta TTL/lock/fee)
backend/test/integration/withdrawals_test.go (below min, fee 100k→5500 net 94500, concurrent overspend impossible, timeout no double payout, quote idempotent)
Verified: migrate version 19; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; go vet ./... PASS
BE-350.notes: Acceptance: concurrent cannot overspend; provider timeout no second payout/no reserve release; terminal settle/release exactly once; actual fee variance journals without rewriting merchant quote/net. Admin UI polish BE-510.

BE-360.title: Storefront attribution and aggregate analytics
evidence: backend/migrations/000020_analytics.up.sql (storefront_sessions, attribution_events, order_attribution_snapshots, store_traffic_daily, analytics_collection_policies, retention_runs; LAUNCH_ANALYTICS_POLICY_V1)
backend/internal/domain/analytics/* (strip/UTM, last-non-direct 30d, CSV escape, bot filter, policy types)
backend/internal/application/analytics_service.go + analytics_repo.go (capture, convert-once, rebuild daily, overview/traffic/export, retention)
Checkout CreateIntent captures attribution; Callback sideEffectsPaid marks conversion; Gateway EnsureQRISNoAttribution
backend/test/integration/analytics_test.go (sensitive URL strip, late-paid once, rebuild equals, QRIS not in traffic, policy seed)
Verified: migrate version 20; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; go vet ./... PASS; architecture boundary PASS
BE-360.notes: Acceptance: rebuild deterministic; PAID converts once incl late-paid; secrets/hashes/QRIS never in seller responses/exports. Phase-3 complete. Next BE-400.

BE-400.title: KYC live API workflow
evidence: backend/internal/domain/kyc/* (status matrix §5.4, types, errors, unit tests)
Server-mediated upload: size/type/scan/EncryptAEAD → private R2 PutObjectBytes; RejectKYCPresign
APPROVE → merchant_api_capabilities LIVE ACTIVE + AUTHORIZED issuance + outbox (no raw key)
LIVE CreateAPIKey denied until capability (BE-410 owns claim UX)
Verified: migrate version 21; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS
BE-400.notes: Acceptance: rejection reason required; non-API storefront never forced through KYC. Next BE-410 credential claim lifecycle.

BE-410.title: Credential lifecycle
evidence: backend/migrations/000022_credentials.up.sql + down (claim hash fields, secret_claims, webhook_endpoint_secret_versions skeleton, key_version/fingerprint)
backend/internal/application/credential_service.go + credential_repo.go (request issuance, claim exchange, list masked, revoke/suspend, admin authorize)
backend/api/openapi.yaml BE-410 paths (claim POST body token only, Cache-Control no-store)
backend/test/integration/credentials_test.go (raw not in DB, double claim fail, live without KYC denied, revoke fails gateway, admin never raw)
kyc_test updated: live key via claim after approve
Verified: migrate version 22; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; go vet ./... PASS
BE-410.notes: Single ACTIVE key per merchant; LIVE claim rechecks KYC capability; sandbox without KYC; admin authorize never raw. Webhook secret delivery is BE-420 (schema skeleton only).

BE-420.title: Outbound seller-webhook delivery
evidence: backend/migrations/000023_webhooks.up.sql + down (webhook_deliveries, attempts, dead_letters; endpoint secret refs)
backend/internal/domain/webhooks/* (types, signing HMAC v1, stable event IDs)
backend/internal/platform/ssrf/* (HTTPS + private IP + DNS rebinding + redirect revalidation)
backend/internal/application/webhook_service.go + webhook_repo.go (CRUD, secret claim, enqueue, deliver, admin retry)
backend/test/integration/webhooks_test.go (private-network reject, retry event/signature semantics, inbound provider IDs rejected)
Verified: migrate version 23; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS
BE-420.notes: API-key and endpoint-secret lifecycles independent; outbound admin namespace separate from provider-callbacks.replay. Next BE-430.

BE-430.title: Buyer identity/purchases/delivery/reviews
evidence: backend/test/integration/buyer_test.go (A≠B order 404, public invoice safe fields, review without delivery rejected)
Verified: migrate version 24; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS
BE-430.notes: Acceptance: buyer cannot access another order; public invoice reveals safe fields only. Magic-link BUYER + delivery access/resend/invoice reused from BE-120/BE-235. Phase-4 complete. Next BE-500.

BE-500.title: Admin read models
evidence: backend/internal/adapters/http/router.go BE-500 routes; provider-callbacks list=webhooks.read; seller-webhook-deliveries list=webhooks.read separate
backend/test/integration/admin_reads_test.go (403 without admin, no secrets, payment source filters, MIXED rejected on payments, 24h volume, deleted domains 404)
Verified: migrate 25; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS
BE-500.notes: FE AdminMerchant/Buyer/Order/Payment/Withdrawal/Inventory/Review contracts; user lookup for BE-520; inbound vs outbound webhook queues remain separate; mutations deferred BE-510/520/530.

BE-510.title: Eight lightweight admin operations
evidence: backend/migrations/000026_admin_ops.up.sql (emergency controls, audit metadata, reviews.moderate, merchant suspension fields)
backend/internal/app/app.go AdminOps wire + emergency into checkout/gateway/withdrawals
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/ -run TestAdminOps_ PASS
BE-510.notes: Acceptance: mutations permissioned/reasoned/audited; payment sources exactly STOREFRONT|QRIS_API; withdrawals MIXED ok; merchant.status vs api_access independent; three emergency switches; no heavy console. Next BE-520 impersonation.

BE-520.title: Admin impersonation
evidence: Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/ -run TestImpersonation_ PASS
BE-520.notes: Acceptance: tampered cookie fails; end/expiry blocks derived session; SUPPORT_WRITE only buyer.profile.support_update + store.presentation.support_update; no PRIVILEGED/FULL; reasoned audit start/end. Next BE-530 audit chain.

BE-530.title: Audit/platform/provider operations
evidence: backend/migrations/000028_audit_chain.up.sql (append_audit_event SECURITY DEFINER, audit_chain_heads, audit_checkpoints, UPDATE/DELETE triggers)
backend/internal/domain/audit/* (JCS-1 canonicalize, row_hash, checkpoint sign payload, golden tests)
Emergency SetEmergencyControl immutable before/after via chain append
Fee: no runtime publish (BE-300 RejectFeeMutation 405 retained)
backend/test/integration/audit_chain_test.go (20 concurrent gap-free, tamper AUDIT_CHAIN_BROKEN, checkpoint overwrite denied, health no secrets, emergency before/after, UPDATE/DELETE denied)
Verified: migrate 28; go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/ -run TestAuditChain_ PASS
BE-530.notes: Acceptance: concurrent appends unique/gap-free under head lock; deliberate row tamper raises AUDIT_CHAIN_BROKEN; checkpoint overwrite/delete denied; fee no runtime publish; health no secrets. Phase-5 complete. Next BE-600.

BE-600.title: Observability/SLO/runbooks
evidence: backend/internal/platform/metrics (Prometheus registry: http, payment_paid, callback, webhook, outbox lag, audit chain)
GET /metrics Prometheus text; middleware Metrics + Trace (X-Request-ID + W3C traceparent)
Tests: metrics text + traceparent smoke; go test ./... PASS; integration PASS; synthetic_health OK on compose :18080
BE-600.notes: Acceptance: staged incident diagnosable via request_id/trace_id/business-safe ids + runbooks. Next BE-610.

BE-610.title: Security verification
evidence: backend/docs/security/residual-risks.md (owner signature placeholders; RR-001 external pentest accepted pending)
backend/scripts/security_scan.sh (go vet, govulncheck, secret scan, deps list, image note) exit 0

Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; security_scan.sh PASS; govulncheck symbol results 0 called vulns
BE-610.notes: Acceptance: no unresolved critical/high in-repo; residual risks documented for owner signature (external pentest RR-001). Next BE-620.

BE-620.title: Performance/resilience
evidence: backend/docs/performance/baseline.md (staging load targets, pool settings, EXPLAIN/index notes for hot paths)
backend/docs/performance/pool-tuning.md (pgx DefaultPoolConfig + ADR-0007 80% budget; Redis non-authority)
backend/scripts/resilience_drills.sh (worker restart, Redis FLUSHDB, fake Xendit timeout tests, concurrent idempotency)
Local drill evidence: worker restart OK; Redis FLUSHDB balances_sum/intents/journals unchanged; API live 200
Integration reuse: TestCallback_DuplicatePaid_SingleEffect (80x), TestConcurrentIdempotencyFirstWriterWins, TestConcurrentWithdrawalsCannotOverspend, TestProviderTimeoutNoDoublePayout
Verified: go test ./... PASS; go test -tags=integration ./test/integration/... PASS; go vet ./... PASS; resilience_drills.sh --local PASS
BE-620.notes: Acceptance: agreed staging load/SLO documented; financial invariants hold under failure injection (tests + local drill report). Next BE-630.

BE-630.title: Staging-to-production launch
evidence: backend/tmp/launch-evidence/* (migrate28, bootstrap, synthetic, security, resilience, unit, integration, callback-fd, canary-local)

current.note: All 36 backend production tasks done; production go-live requires owner signatures

definitionOfDone: code in correct module + dependency direction
frontend adapter can use contract without UI change
